elements.title: Wangdue Phodrang Dzong
elements.contents: ... that the Wangdue Phodrang Dzong (pictured) was destroyed by a fire in 1837, damaged by an earthquake in 1897 and destroyed again by a fire in 2012?

elements.title: Walt Whitman Park
elements.contents: ... that Walt Whitman Park was the site of the first playground built on public parkland for children of U.S. government workers?

elements.title: Alec Radford
elements.contents: ... that in 2018, Alec Radford was the lead author on OpenAI's research paper on generative pre-trained transformers, which form the foundation of ChatGPT?
